escalation.rationale: Houthis opened third front against Israel with missile attack while Russia intensifies spring offensive against Ukraine with 400-drone assault.

ticker_items: Houthis launch first missile at Israel since Iran war began
Russian spring offensive underway with 400-drone barrage on Ukraine
Israeli airstrike kills 3 journalists in southern Lebanon
Ukraine signs defense agreements with UAE and Qatar
Iran strike wounds US troops at Saudi airbase

new_entrant.text: Houthis opened third front against Israel with first missile attack since US-Israel war on Iran began.

eastern_europe.description: Continued spring offensive operations with increased assault frequency along entire frontline.
Drone strike damages Project 23550 Arctic patrol ship Purga under construction.
Russia launched over 270 drones targeting civilian areas killing at least 5 people.
Russian forces killed 4 people and damaged maternity hospital in ongoing spring offensive strikes.

middle_east.description: Ballistic missile barrage targeting sensitive Israeli military sites, first Houthi attack on Israel.
Ballistic missiles and drones targeted six US tactical vessels and base facilities.
Airstrikes hit Iranian heavy water nuclear reactor with no reported radiation leak.
Air strikes targeted sites belonging to Iraq's Popular Mobilisation Forces.
Iranian strike on US airbase wounded 15 troops, 5 seriously, and damaged refueling aircraft.
Houthis launched ballistic missile toward Israel in first attack since Iran war began.
Israeli airstrikes killed three Palestinian men in two separate attacks.
Houthis launched ballistic missile toward Israel from Yemen, intercepted by Israeli military.
Israeli airstrike on car killed three journalists covering Israel-Hezbollah war.
Iranian strike on US airbase in Saudi Arabia wounded several American service members.

today.incident: Iranian IRGC attack on US base Saudi Arabia
US-Israeli strike on Iran toddler rescue
Iran strikes US base Saudi Arabia

US-Israel attacks on Iran total deaths

ukraine.text: Kyiv faces a deficit of missiles as Washington is focused on its war on Iran
ukraine.speaker: Volodymyr Zelenskyy
ukraine.title: President of Ukraine

ukraine.text: Last night, the Russians launched a massive strike on Odesa. There was no military purpose whatsoever — this was pure terror against ordinary civilian life
ukraine.speaker: Volodymyr Zelenskyy
ukraine.title: Ukrainian President

ukraine.text: Ukraine's President Zelenskyy warns that Kyiv faces a deficit of missiles as Washington is focused on its war on Iran
ukraine.speaker: Volodymyr Zelenskyy
ukraine.title: President of Ukraine

middle_east.text: We launched ballistic missiles at Israel, we will continue until the attacks stop
middle_east.speaker: Houthis spokesperson
middle_east.title: Yemen Houthis

middle_east.text: We are negotiating, but the Strait of Hormuz must be opened
middle_east.speaker: Donald Trump
middle_east.title: US President

middle_east.text: Iran [is a] lunatic nation [that has been] militarily decimated
middle_east.speaker: Donald Trump
middle_east.title: US President

middle_east.text: With the help of Allah Almighty and relying upon Allah, (we) have carried out the first military operation using a barrage of ballistic missiles
middle_east.speaker: Houthis
middle_east.title: Yemen Houthi rebels

middle_east.text: Iran, North Korea, China, and Russia—that's all one war
middle_east.speaker: Ukrainian military delegation
middle_east.title: Military officials

observers.description: Chancellor Merz stated the US-Israeli war against Iran is unlikely to achieve regime change. Germany increased defense spending to 2.4% of GDP in 2025 amid rising global tensions.
President Lukashenko signed a new treaty on friendship and cooperation with North Korea's Kim Jong-un in Pyongyang. Belarus announced plans to open an embassy in North Korea following the talks.

Manitoba Premier Wab Kinew called the Iran conflict 'a dumb war' and urged Prime Minister Mark Carney to take action. Canadian Army is preparing major reorganization amid finalizing mobilization plans.
UK commits additional £100 million air defense package for Ukraine to protect cities and critical infrastructure. Britain continues supporting Ukraine while US focus shifts to Iran war.

UAE signed defense cooperation agreement with Ukraine focusing on countering Iranian drones and missiles. President Sheikh Mohammed bin Zayed Al Nahyan met with Zelenskyy as Ukraine seeks Gulf support against Russian attacks.

Qatar signed defense agreement with Ukraine including cooperation on countering missile and drone threats. Zelenskyy visited Qatar as part of Middle East tour seeking military cooperation and fuel supply deals.

financial.notes: US consumers suffering from skyrocketing gas prices, soaring interest rates and plummeting stock market one month into Iran war.

Ukraine signed defense agreements with UAE and Qatar during Zelenskyy's Middle East tour
Iranian strike on US airbase in Saudi Arabia wounded several American service members
Russian spring offensive underway with 400-drone assault on Ukrainian civilian areas killing 4

Iran strikes US airbase in Saudi Arabia wounding 15 American troops, 5 seriously
Russia launches over 270 drones at Ukraine killing 5 civilians in Odesa strikes
Israeli airstrikes kill three Palestinian men in Gaza despite five-month ceasefire
US-Israel war on Iran enters second month with no signs of abating

US casualties in Iranian IRGC attack on Saudi base rise to 15 injured soldiers
Israeli airstrikes hit Iranian heavy water nuclear reactor at Khondab with no radiation leak reported
Air strikes target Popular Mobilisation Forces sites in Mosul, Iraq with thick smoke rising
Rescue teams save toddler from destroyed building after US-Israeli strike on Iran
